title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
desc: The body of a promising young radio host turns up near a road in south Houston. Detective Harris takes the case, and uncovers a tragic tale of love and deceit.

title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
desc: With years of experience, Joe Kenda has been witness to astounding cases that expose a dark side of human nature. He brings in his case files and dissects the process of investigation.

title: Eight Legged Freaks
desc: The people of Prosperity, a mining town in Arizona, find themselves battling gigantic spiders after a barrel containing toxic waste is accidentally released into a reservoir.

title: The Green Hornet
desc: After his father's death, Britt inherits the largest media company in Los Angeles. He teams up with Kato to fight crime but ends up becoming the target of a gangster, Benjamin Chudnofsky.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man
desc: After a genetically altered spider bites him, Peter Parker develops superhuman abilities and confronts a humanoid reptilian creature.

title: Anaconda
desc: A snake hunter offers his assistance to a documentary crew attempting to film an indigenous tribe in the Amazon. But as the journey progresses, his presence forces them to veer into dangerous waters.

title: Ninja Assassin
desc: A lethal assassin named Raizo embarks on a violent quest for vengeance against his former clan, who are responsible for the murder of a woman he once loved.

title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
desc: A group of people tries to survive while a dying city gets overrun by zombies.

title: Food Factory
desc: Curious minds explore how food items like chequerboard cookies, honey and wheat bread are manufactured from raw materials.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: In Mexico's Copper Canyon, Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive by using traditional cave shelters, fishing without lines or nets and even eating mud.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls shows how to survive the big island of Hawaii, home to Kilauea, the world's most active volcano and one of the toughest places on Earth.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear travels to America's greatest mountain range-the Sierra Nevada. He uses his knowledge of American Indian survival techniques to build shelters, calm wild horses, and find food.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear travels to America's greatest mountain range-the Sierra Nevada. He uses his knowledge of American Indian survival techniques to build shelters, calm wild horses, and find food.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls has served with the British Special forces, climbed to the peak of Everest and explored the frozen ocean of the Arctic. Now he faces the punishing heat of the Moab desert in Utah.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls draws upon all his experience as a survivor to tackle the dangers of the Costa Rican rainforest, climbing 100 ft trees and down 120 ft waterfalls, facing snakes and sweltering humidity.

title: Toddlers & Tiaras
desc: The contestants have been working on their Christmas wear routines to convince the judges to give them the gift of the biggest crown at the Universal Royalty Christmas pageant in Austin, Texas.

title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?
desc: When former city cop Chris admits to his young wife Audrey that he has gambled away all their money, she asks for a divorce. But will her desperate husband let her go?

title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
desc: When Susan Powell vanishes without a trace, her husband claims to have no idea what happened. But many feel he may have had a hand in her disappearance.

title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
desc: When arson investigators find a man dead in a burned-out Kentucky home, Detective Leigh Meroni must catch the sinister killer before he strikes again.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man
desc: After a genetically altered spider bites him, Peter Parker develops superhuman abilities and confronts a humanoid reptilian creature.

title: Anaconda
desc: A snake hunter offers his assistance to a documentary crew attempting to film an indigenous tribe in the Amazon. But as the journey progresses, his presence forces them to veer into dangerous waters.

title: Ninja Assassin
desc: A lethal assassin named Raizo embarks on a violent quest for vengeance against his former clan, who are responsible for the murder of a woman he once loved.

title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
desc: A group of people tries to survive while a dying city gets overrun by zombies.

title: Never Back Down: No Surrender
desc: Former martial arts title holder prepares to return to familiar fields and uses his traditional fighting skills against the new line of fighters in order to reclaim his position.

title: Green Lantern
desc: Reckless test pilot Hal Jordan is chosen by a mystical ring, gaining supernatural powers. He joins the intergalactic police to face the evil Parallax threatening Earth.
